sourceUsePolicy.industryCommentaryPolicy: Industry and vendor commentary may identify useful SIEM/SOAR/ITSM patterns but cannot justify a compliance mapping without an official EU, ENISA, or national source first.
sourceUsePolicy.legalInterpretationPolicy: Rows requiring legal interpretation remain visible with requires-legal-review confidence and a Splunk evidence or workflow boundary.
